headline: This Craig-Hallum Analyst Turns Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Monday
summary: Analysts downgraded ratings on Cardiff Oncology, Crescent Biopharma, Corsair Gaming, Equity Residential and Caesars Entertainment.

headline: Deutsche Bank Downgrades Caesars Entertainment to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $31
summary: Deutsche Bank  analyst Carlo Santarelli   downgrades Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $35 to $31.
